title: draba serpentina
intro: Draba serpentina, also known as Himalayan pennywort, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba serpentina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
